Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails with a query related to "Beacon Analytics" or "Marcus Webb" or "Tyler Chen" or "Priya Das" (or similar) using search_emails or similar to find the client escalation from Marcus Webb and Julian's ownership assignment email.
OE 2: Search Slack messages with a query related to "Beacon Analytics" or "Tyler" or "Linear" or "Priya" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages or conversations_history to find Julian's heads-up in #customer-support about the missing Linear tickets and Priya's Airtable flag.
OE 3: Search the CRM with a query related to "Beacon Analytics" or "beacon" (or similar) using crm_search_deals or crm_get_deal to find the Beacon Analytics onboarding deal with both employee details, Marcus Webb's contact.
OE 4: Search Airtable records with a query related to "Beacon Analytics" or "Priya Das" or "moving_supplies" (or similar) using airtable_list_records or airtable_search_records on base appMoveOpsOps001 to find Priya's falsely auto-rejected $280 stipend record and confirm the correct policy limit.
OE 5: Search Linear issues with a query related to "Beacon Analytics" or "Tyler Chen" or "Priya Das" (or similar) using linear_list_issues to confirm no tracking tickets exist for either employee and all issues must be created from scratch.
OE 6: Search QuickBooks invoices with a query related to "Beacon Analytics" or "INV-2026" (or similar) using quickbooks_search_invoices or quickbooks_read_invoice to retrieve the overdue invoice status, amount ($18,500), and due date (March 24 2026).
OE 7: Send an email with sender omar.ibrahim@moveops.com and recipient marcus.webb@beaconanalytics.com using send_email to deliver a client response covering both Tyler Chen's relocation status and Priya Das's expense rejection with a remediation commitment.
OE 8: Send an email with recipient at an @moveops.com address (e.g., mina.hashimoto@moveops.com or samira.tariq@moveops.com) and body naming Priya Das using send_email to request manual correction of her auto-rejected Airtable stipend record distinct from the external email to Marcus.
OE 9: Update the CRM deal record targeting deal_beacon_analytics_onboarding using crm_update_deal_stage to change the deal stage, and log notes referencing the tracking gap, expense correction, and client outreach using crm_create_engagement to bring the Beacon Analytics account record up to date.
OE 10: Create Linear issues with titles referencing "Tyler Chen" and "Priya Das" and task types such as "apartment," "flight," or "movers" (or similar) using linear_create_issue to establish relocation tracking for both employees.
OE 11: Send a Slack message to channel C007 (#customer-support) using conversations_add_message to notify the team that the Beacon Analytics account is being handled.
